# Technical Architecture {.appendix}

```{mermaid}
%%| fig-cap: "Pipeline stages from raw filings to verified clause extractions."
flowchart LR
    A["Download"] --> B["Parse"]
    B --> C["Locate"]
    C --> D["Extract"]
    D --> E["Verify"]
```

| Stage | What it does |
|-------|-------------|
| **Download** | Pull sovereign bond filings from SEC EDGAR, FCA NSM, and PDIP via source-specific API adapters |
| **Parse** | Extract text from PDFs (PyMuPDF) and HTML, preserving page boundaries |
| **Locate** | Section-aware regex cue matching finds candidate clause regions |
| **Extract** | LLM receives candidate region and extracts the clause verbatim |
| **Verify** | Fuzzy string match (95% threshold) checks extraction against source text |

```{mermaid}
%%| fig-cap: "Data sources and document counts."
pie title Documents by Source
    "SEC EDGAR" : 3301
    "FCA NSM" : 645
    "PDIP" : 823
```

**Stack.** Python 3.12, DuckDB, Click CLI, PyMuPDF. MIT licensed. All code: [GitHub](https://github.com/Teal-Insights/sovereign-prospectus-corpus)
